title: tricalysia longistipulata
intro: Tricalysia longistipulata is a species of plant in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Long-stipled Tricalysia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Tricalysia longistipulata is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or dried and used as a powder for various medicinal purposes.
